creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to nightquick from comment #14)
Please, refer to comment #6.

This is not how updates to a port are handled.
And as I said before, the ports tree is not the place to "improve" the quality of a port. The patches we have in the tree are mainly to help in the build process and/or to adapt the software to the FreeBSD specificity.

If the main goal of this PR is to improve "tt", then a fork should be made and then ask to change the port so we pull the new and improved sources.
